positive: A detailed, Victorian botanical plate illustration of exotic, fantastical flora, such as glowing orchids and iridescent ferns. The style should mimic scientific etching and cross-hatching, using deep emerald greens, sepia tones, and meticulous linework. Perfect for a vintage journal aesthetic.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
